SR_SPLMTL_FINCL_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

LABEL: Screened Supplemental HRSN Financial Strain Overall Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) financial strain composite 
indicator. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_FINCL_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for financial strain
